title: Home After Three Months Away
content:

and made the Mother cry.

title: Identification In Belfast
content:
(I.R.A. Bombing)

The British Army now carries two rifles,
one with rubber rabbit-pellets for children,
the other's of course for the Provisionals.

title: The Drunken Fisherman

title: The Old Flame
content:

by our house in Maine. It was still
on top of its hill,
